name: Community One Credit Union Of Ohio
description_short: Community One Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving the Canton, Ohio area with two physical locations offering checking, savings, loans, and ATM access.
description_long: Community One Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union based in Canton, Ohio, with roots serving the local community through member-owned banking services. The organization maintains two physical branch locations: the main Jackson Township office near Interstate 77 and a Downtown Canton location, each providing in-person banking services during extended weekday and Saturday hours. Their service offerings include home and auto loans, account access, and loan applications, positioning them as a full-service credit union focused on consumer banking needs. The credit union is governed by an active board of directors including Chairman David Booth and seven additional board members, suggesting established organizational structure and community accountability. Community One distinguishes itself through local presence and accessibility, operating surcharge-free ATMs and maintaining Saturday hours at both locations to accommodate working customers. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, members benefit from the cooperative ownership model, though the website provides limited detail on specific rates, products, or membership eligibility requirements. The institution appears to operate as a mid-sized regional credit union without national presence, making it most relevant to existing or prospective members in the Canton area seeking local banking relationships.
pros: Two convenient physical branch locations in Jackson Township and Downtown Canton with extended hours including Saturday service
Surcharge-free ATM available at main Jackson Township location
Toll-free customer service line (800-469-0497) plus local support
Saturday hours (9:00 AM - 1:00 PM) at both locations for weekend banking
Extended Friday hours (until 6:00 PM) at both branches for working professionals
Member-owned credit union structure with established board of directors
Home and auto loan products available with online application option
cons: Limited online information about specific loan rates, terms, APRs, or product details
No mention of mobile banking app, online account opening, or digital-only services
Website lacks information about membership eligibility requirements or membership fees
Minimal product information—no details on checking/savings account types, interest rates, or CD offerings
Only two physical locations limits accessibility for customers outside the Canton area
best_for: Current and prospective residents of the Canton/North Canton, Ohio area seeking local banking relationships
Borrowers interested in home and auto financing with in-person support and relationship banking
Customers who value Saturday banking hours and community-focused credit union membership
diagnosis: Community One Credit Union is best for Canton, Ohio-area residents or employees seeking local credit union banking with convenient branch access and personal service. The main caveat is the lack of detailed online information about products, rates, and membership requirements—prospective members will need to contact the credit union directly for specifics.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Community One Credit Union serves Canton, Ohio with checking, savings, loans, and ATM access at two locations.
